Illustration of overlapping resume samples with decorative stars and an approval checkmark for ATS matching. Improve your score in 5 mins Make small improvements to your resume score. A match rate of 85% or higher significantly boosts your interview chances. 15% ATS Match 81% Resume Score HR Approved Skills Management Skills Analytical Thinking Leadership + Add skill ATS Parsing Keyword Match Action Verbs Formatting The hidden filter blocking your interviews Companies don't read every resume. They use Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) to auto-screen candidates. Ensure every detail meets the highest parsing standards, exceeding recruiter expectations. 1 Upload 2 Scan 3 Issues 4 Fix Diagnose and fix your resume in minutes Our AI platform analyzes your document exactly like an employer's software, exposing weaknesses before you apply. Turn rejections into interviews. ATS Compatibility Analysis We parse your resume to ensure structural integrity. Find out if tables or complex layouts are corrupting your data. Keyword Optimization Paste the job description. Our system instantly identifies missing hard skills, soft skills, and industry terminology. Bullet Point Rewriting Transform weak duties into high-impact, measurable achievements using AI trained on successful resumes. 80 Candidates applied HR Manager 3 To interview 77 Auto-rejected ‹ All Software Engineer Product Manager Marketing Data Scientist Sales HR Manager Designer Finance Operations Customer Support › Get the interview with professional resume examples Impress employers and recruiters. Choose from hundreds of professionally-designed resume examples tailored for your exact role. Download to Word or PDF. See all resume examples 203 resumes created today A draft in 10 mins The AI builder is much faster than starting from scratch. Fewer mistakes Fix typos and formatting issues before recruiters review your resume. ATS templates Use recruiter-friendly structures that parse correctly in ATS systems. I agree to processing of my personal data for review moderation. Submit review Cancel Ready to see if your resume fits the role of | Upload your resume. It takes 10 seconds. Check ATS score free FAQ How do ATS systems work? ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) scan resumes, extract text, and score candidates by how well the content matches job keywords and requirements. What file formats does Pitch My CV accept? We support standard resume formats including PDF (.pdf), Microsoft Word (.doc, .docx). For the most accurate scanning and formatting preservation, we highly recommend uploading your resume as a PDF file. The maximum file size limit is 5MB. Is the free ATS check really free? Yes, absolutely. You can run one comprehensive ATS scan for free without entering any credit card details. This gives you a clear baseline score and highlights critical formatting issues. For users needing deeper insights, unlimited scans, and advanced AI rewriting, we offer flexible Pro and Lifetime plans. How long does the scan take? Our scanning engine is built for speed. In most cases, analyzing your resume against industry-standard ATS algorithms takes less than 30 seconds. Complex PDFs with unusual formatting might occasionally take slightly longer. What is an ATS score? An ATS (Applicant Tracking System) score is an estimate of how effectively parsing software can read and understand your resume. It evaluates factors like keyword density, section headers, formatting structure, and measurable impact. A higher score means a human recruiter is much more likely to actually see your application. Does Pitch My CV rewrite my resume automatically? No, you remain in full control. We do not alter your original document. Instead, our AI provides actionable suggestions, identifies missing keywords, and offers targeted rewrite options for specific bullet points. You choose which recommendations to apply to craft the perfect narrative. Is my resume data kept private? Privacy is our top priority. We use secure encryption to process your files. We never sell your personal data or share your resume with third parties. Furthermore, files uploaded for the free scan are automatically deleted from our servers shortly after analysis. For full details, please review our Privacy Policy . How does the AI improve my resume? Our AI compares your resume content directly against the specific job description you provide. It identifies crucial missing hard and soft skills, flags vague or weak action verbs, and suggests concrete, metric-driven language to make your achievements stand out to both software filters and hiring managers. Does Pitch My CV guarantee interviews or job offers? While an optimized resume drastically improves your visibility, we cannot guarantee specific outcomes. Hiring decisions depend on numerous external factors including interview performance, market competition, and employer preferences. We guarantee to give you the best possible foundation to get past automated filters. What keywords should I add to my resume? The right keywords vary entirely by role. You should focus on specific technical tools, methodologies, and core competencies explicitly mentioned in the job description you're applying for. Our scanner automates this process by instantly extracting those vital keywords for you. Can I scan multiple resumes? The free tier allows for a single baseline scan to experience the platform. If you are tailoring resumes for multiple different job postings—which is highly recommended for best results—our Pro plans offer unlimited scanning and optimization features. Can I cancel my subscription? Yes, you can manage or cancel your subscription at any time directly from your account settings page. There are no hidden fees or lock-in contracts, and your premium access will remain active until the end of your current paid billing cycle. Ready to improve your resume? Scan your resume now to see your ATS score and fix what's holding you back. acceptedAnswer.text: ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) scan resumes, extract text, and score candidates by how well the content matches job keywords and requirements.

mainEntity.name: What file formats does Pitch My CV accept?
Is the free ATS check really free?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. One free scan, no card required. Pro plans add unlimited scans and AI optimization.

mainEntity.name: How long does the scan take?

acceptedAnswer.text: A score that estimates how well your resume will parse and match keywords in typical ATS systems. Higher score = better chance of passing filters.

mainEntity.name: Does Pitch My CV rewrite my resume automatically?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. We suggest improvements; you decide what to accept, reject, or edit.

mainEntity.name: Is my resume data kept private?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Files are processed securely, not sold, and can be deleted anytime.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI improve my resume?

acceptedAnswer.text: It finds missing keywords from the job description and suggests natural rewrites with stronger, metric-driven language.

mainEntity.name: Does Pitch My CV guarantee interviews or job offers?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Results depend on many factors: employer systems, job market, your applications. We help optimize your resume for ATS filters.

mainEntity.name: What keywords should I add to my resume?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use terms from the job description: skills, tools, and qualifications. Our scan highlights missing keywords for the role you target.
Free: one scan. Pro: unlimited scans.
Yes. Cancel anytime in account settings. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
